instructions.stateAccess: Use gh CLI to read/write state on autopilot-state branch
instructions.lockProtocol: Check locks/ directory via gh api before starting operations. Always release locks on completion.
instructions.sessionGuard: CRITICAL: Before any state-changing operation, check session-lock.json. If locked by claude-code, ABORT and create a handoff instead. Never force override another agent's lock.
instructions.releaseProtocol: Follow workspace.json config, use gh CLI for API operations
instructions.handoffProtocol: Read pending handoffs via gh api, update status on completion
instructions.auditProtocol: Record actions via gh api to audit directory after every state mutation
instructions.sourceCodeChanges: Use apply-source-change.yml workflow or trigger file. Never push directly to corporate repos without session lock.
